claim: The Eiffel Tower is located in Paris.
Inception is a 2010 science fiction film directed by Christopher Nolan.
The Pacific Ocean is the largest ocean on Earth.
William Shakespeare wrote Hamlet and Romeo and Juliet.
Tom Cruise has never won an Academy Award for Best Actor.
The director of Inception also directed The Dark Knight Rises.
The Dark Knight grossed more than Inception worldwide.
The 2008 Olympic Games were held in Beijing.
Christopher Nolan was born in London in 1970.
Skagen Painter Peder Severin Kroyer favored naturalism along with Theodor Esbern Philipsen.
The actor who played Bane in The Dark Knight Rises also starred in Inception.
Mount Everest is taller than K2.
Albert Einstein was a German-born theoretical physicist who developed the theory of relativity.
Apple Inc. was founded in 1976 by Steve Jobs and Steve Wozniak.
The Great Wall of China is not visible from the Moon with the naked eye.
The Beatles were a British rock band that formed in Liverpool in 1960.
Marie Curie was the first person to win two Nobel Prizes in different sciences.
Mars has more moons than Earth.
The author of 1984 also wrote Animal Farm.
The Wright brothers made the first powered flight in 1903 at Kitty Hawk.
Leonardo DiCaprio starred in a film directed by Martin Scorsese that won Best Picture.
The Roman Empire reached its greatest territorial extent under Emperor Trajan in the 2nd century AD.
Saturn has more moons than Jupiter.
Barack Obama was the 44th President of the United States and a Nobel Peace Prize laureate.
The actor who portrayed Iron Man in the Marvel Cinematic Universe was born in 1965.
Charles Darwin published On the Origin of Species in 1859, proposing the theory of evolution by natural selection.
The Mona Lisa was not painted by Michelangelo.
Tokyo has a larger population than New York City.
The 1969 moon landing was followed by five additional successful Apollo missions to the lunar surface.
The composer who wrote The Four Seasons was an Italian Baroque-era musician.
